title: selaginella tenerrima
intro: Selaginella tenerrima, also known as the brittle club moss or spiny club moss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Selaginella tenerrima include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
